member.name: T:Lumina.Data.Files.TexFile.TextureFormat
member.summary:
Texture formats. Channel ordering in name follows the enumeration in DXGI_FORMAT.
Excerpt from: https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/api/dxgiformat/ne-dxgiformat-dxgi_format > Most formats have byte-aligned components, and the components are in C-array order (the least address comes first). > For those formats that don't have power-of-2-aligned components, the first named component is in the least-significant bits.

member.name: F:Lumina.Data.Parsing.MdlStructs.ShapeMeshStruct.MeshIndexOffset
member.summary: From TT: The offset to the index block this Shape Data should be replacing in. This is how Shape Data is tied to each mesh.

member.name: F:Lumina.Data.Parsing.MdlStructs.ShapeValueStruct.BaseIndicesIndex
member.summary: PROBABLY: Index into the Indices array of a mesh.

member.name: F:Lumina.Data.Parsing.MdlStructs.ShapeValueStruct.ReplacingVertexIndex
member.summary: PROBABLY: Index into the (without transformation probably unused) vertex of a mesh.

members.member:
These values are actually CRC values used by SE in order to coordinate mappings to shaders. Textures do not actually store whether they are diffuse, specular, etc. They store the shader that this texture is input for, in CRC form.
That was my long way of explaining "these are linked manually."

member.name: P:Lumina.LuminaOptions.CurrentPlatform
member.summary: Current platform id used to load data files

member.name: P:Lumina.LuminaOptions.CacheFileResources
member.summary: If true, each loaded FileResource will have a weak reference maintained by Lumina so that sequential loads will return the pre-loaded file in the event it hasn't been GC'd/a reference is maintained elsewhere. This is constrained by the file type used to load, so loading the same file as a FileResource and then a TexFile will kill the old FileResource reference and replace it with a TexFile reference and miss the cache.

member.name: P:Lumina.LuminaOptions.DefaultExcelLanguage
member.summary: The default language to fetch from Excel sheets. Can be overriden on a case-by-case basis but this serves as the default.

member.name: P:Lumina.LuminaOptions.PanicOnSheetChecksumMismatch
member.summary: Whether or not an exception should be thrown in the event that a sheet's column checksum no longer matches. This has no effect on sheets which do not define a column checksum.

member.name: M:Lumina.Models.Materials.Material.ResolveRelativeMaterialPath(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Resolves a relative material path in the form /mt_c0101e0001_top_a.mtrl into its full path, chara/equipment/e0001/material/v{variantId}/mt_c0101e0001_top_a.mtrl.
The Regex used to search is contained in the partial that follows the function.
This method will successfully resolve all known relative material paths.
member.param: The relative path of the provided material.
The variant to use in material resolution.
member.returns: The resolved, absolute path to the requested material, or null if unsuccessful.

member.name: M:Lumina.Models.Materials.Material.MatNameRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
/mt_(?'id1'[cdmw])(?'val1'\\d{4})(?'id2'[abefhtze])(?'val2'\\d{4})_(?:\\w{3}(?:_\\w)|(?:\\w))\\.mtrl
Explanation:
○ Match the string "/mt_".
○ "id1" capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [cdmw].
○ "val1" capture group.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 4 times.
○ "id2" capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [abefhtz].
○ "val2" capture group.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 4 times.
○ Match '_'.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a word character exactly 3 times.
○ Match '_'.
○ Match a word character.
○ Match a word character.
○ Match the string ".mtrl".

member.name: M:Lumina.Models.Materials.Material.GetVariantIdFromPath(System.String)
member.summary: Parse the variant ID out of an existing absolute path to a .mtrl file.
member.param: The absolute path to an existing .mtrl file.
member.returns: The variant ID for the given .mtrl path. In case of error, 1.

member.name: T:Lumina.Models.Models.Model.ModelLod
member.summary: Model levels of details start at 0 for high, and go up to indicate lowering levels of detail. This means that models with only one level of detail will only have a "high quality" model.

member.param: The MdlFile to back this Model.
The quality of the loaded Model.
The variant ID of the Model to load. This will be used to specify a Material variant, and may be used by the caller to limit attributes depending on data from an ImcFile.
member.exception: The specified MdlFile does not contain the specified ModelLod.

member.exception: The specified MdlFile does not contain the specified ModelLod.

member.name: M:Lumina.Text.Parse.MacroStringParser.ParseMacroStringAndAppend(System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Parses the macro string.
member.param: Whether to stop parsing if a character requires escaping to have itself skipped from being processed as a part of string representation of SeString payloads. Used to allow using special characters used to form string representation of SeString payloads, such as ( or ,, when the string being parsed is at the topmost level (not a part of string SeString expression.)

If any of the bytes in this span is encountered while parsing, it will be treated as the end of the current string being parsed. Used to terminate parsing string SeString expressions, so that it can exclude ) from the expression and stop when parsing <string(asdf)>, instead of producing asdf) as the parsed string SeString expression and fail with invalid syntax.
member.returns: One past the final offset in that got parsed.

member.remarks: Parameters: bool enabled.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.NonBreakingSpace
member.summary: Adds a non-breaking space.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Hyphen
member.summary: Adds a hyphen.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Num
member.summary: Adds a decimal representation of an integer expression.
member.remarks: Parameters: integer expression, terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Hex
member.summary: Adds a hexadecimal representation of an integer expression.
member.remarks: Parameters: integer expression, terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Kilo
member.summary: Adds a decimal representation of an integer expression, separating by thousands.
member.remarks: Parameters: integer expression, separator (usually a comma or a dot), terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Byte
member.summary: Adds a human-readable byte string (possible suffixes: omitted, K, M, G, T).
member.remarks: Parameters: integer expression, terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Sec
member.summary: Adds a zero-padded-to-two-digits decimal representation of an integer expression.
member.remarks: Parameters: integer expression, terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Float
member.summary: Adds a floating point number as text.
member.remarks: Parameters: integer expression, radix, separator, terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Link
member.summary: Begins or ends a region of link.
member.remarks:
Parameters: , numeric argument 1, numeric argument 2, numeric argument 3, display string.
See comments in for the argument usages.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Sheet
member.summary: Adds a column from a sheet.
member.remarks: Parameters: sheet name, row ID, column index, expression passed as first local parameter to the columns text.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.String
member.summary: Adds a string expression as-is.
member.remarks: Parameters: string expression, terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Caps
member.summary: Adds a string, fully upper cased.
member.remarks: Parameters: string expression, terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Head
member.summary: Adds a string, first character upper cased.
member.remarks: Parameters: string expression, terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.HeadAll
member.summary: Adds a string, every words first character upper cased.
member.remarks: Parameters: string expression, terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Lower
member.summary: Adds a string, fully lower cased.
member.remarks: Parameters: string expression, terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.JaNoun
member.summary: Adds sheet text with proper declension in Japanese.
member.remarks: Parameters: sheet name, person, row id, amount, unused, unknown offset.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.EnNoun
member.summary: Adds sheet text with proper declension in English.
member.remarks: Parameters: sheet name, person, row id, amount, unused, unused.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.DeNoun
member.summary: Adds sheet text with proper declension in German.
member.remarks: Parameters: sheet name, person, row id, amount, case, unused.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.FrNoun
member.summary: Adds sheet text with proper declension in French.
member.remarks: Parameters: sheet name, person, row id, amount, unused, unknown offset.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.ChNoun
member.summary: Adds sheet text with proper declension in Chinese.
member.remarks: Parameters: sheet name, unused, row id, amount, unused, unknown offset.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.LowerHead
member.summary: Adds a string, first character lower cased.
member.remarks: Parameters: string expression, terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.SheetSub
member.summary: Adds a column from a subsheets secondary sheet.
member.remarks: Parameters: sheet name, row ID, subrow ID, column index, secondary sheet name, secondary sheet column index.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.SwitchPlatform
member.summary: Adds a text from the Platform sheet.
member.remarks: Parameters: unadjusted row id.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.ColorType
member.summary: Pushes the text foreground color, referring to a color defined in UIColor sheet.
member.remarks: Parameters: row ID in UIColor sheet or 0 to pop(or reset?) the pushed color, terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.EdgeColorType
member.summary: Pushes the text border color, referring to a color defined in UIColor sheet.
member.remarks: Parameters: row ID in UIColor sheet or 0 to pop(or reset?) the pushed color, terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Ruby
member.summary: Displays ruby text (furigana, interlinear annotation) above standard text.

remarks.para: Name of this payload is not defined in the client.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Digit
member.summary: Adds a zero-padded number as text.
member.remarks: Parameters: integer expression, target length, terminator.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Ordinal
member.summary: Adds an ordinal number as text (English only).

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.Sound
member.summary: Adds an invisible sound payload.
member.remarks: Parameters: bool whether this sound is a Jingle (see sheet), the id.

member.name: F:Lumina.Text.Payloads.MacroCode.LevelPos
member.summary: Adds a formatted map name and corresponding coordinates, in the format of Map Name\n( X , Y ).
member.remarks: Parameters: row ID in Level sheet, terminator.

member.name: M:Lumina.Text.SeStringBuilder.GetViewAsMemory
member.summary: Gets the view of SeString being built.
member.returns: View of the SeString being built.

remarks.p: Returned view is invalidated upon any mutation to this builder, including and . If is being used, then returning to the pool also will invalidate the returned view.

After the last element (right after the end of the returned memory/span), NUL is present. You can pin the returned value and use the pointer to the first element as a pointer to null-terminated string.

member.name: M:Lumina.Text.SeStringBuilder.PushColorType(System.UInt32)
